home.hero_subtitle: Empowering Indian families to recognize, resist, and report digital threats.
home.features_subtitle: Master the tools and knowledge needed to protect yourself and your family.
home.feat1_desc: Bite-sized lessons on phishing, OTP frauds & social engineering — tailored to the Indian context.
home.feat2_desc: Test your instincts against simulated scam messages, emails & calls in a safe environment.
home.feat3_desc: Track emerging scam trends in your region and stay one step ahead with live community data.
home.showcase_desc: Experience our high-production-value video modules designed to educate every Indian household about digital safety through immersive storytelling and cinematic visuals.
home.showcase_feat1_d: See how scams happen in everyday life.
home.showcase_feat2_d: Control the narrative and learn at your own pace.

learn.title: Learning Modules
learn.subtitle: Master cyber defense strategies through interactive lessons.
learn.mod_phish_d: Learn how scammers trick you into revealing sensitive information through deceptive messages.
learn.mod_otp_d: Understand how bank impersonators steal your money using One Time Passwords.
learn.mod_job_d: Identify fraudulent work-from-home offers and foreign job placements.
learn.mod_soc_d: Protect yourself from cloned accounts asking for money in emergencies.
